zh.lifeSummary: 當John Greystoke於大約1390年出生在英國波藍德時，他的父親Ralph Greystoke38歲，母親Katherine de Clifford38歲。他於1407年10月28日與Lady Elizabeth de Ferrers結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1421年被列為constable of roxburgh castle - being paid £1,000 p.a.。他去世於1436年8月8日在英國諾薩普頓史爾分頓享年47歲，埋葬在英國諾圖恩布利亞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Greystoke于大约1390年出生在英国波藍德时，他的父亲Ralph Greystoke38岁，母亲Katherine de Clifford38岁。他于1407年10月28日与Lady Elizabeth de Ferrers结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1421年被列为constable of roxburgh castle - being paid £1,000 p.a.。他去世于1436年8月8日在英国諾薩普頓史爾分頓享年47岁，埋葬在英国諾圖恩布利亞。

nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Graystock
meanings: English: locative name, from Greystoke (Cumb), recorded as Graystock in 1291.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Greystoke was born about 1390, in Cumberland, England, his father, Ralph Greystoke, was 38 and his mother, Katherine de Clifford, was 38. He married Lady Elizabeth de Ferrers on 28 October 1407. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. In 1421, at the age of 32, his occupation is listed as constable of roxburgh castle - being paid £1,000 p.a.. He died on 8 August 1436, in Finedon, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 47, and was buried in Northumbria, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Greystoke est né environ 1390, à Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Greystoke, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Katherine de Clifford, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth de Ferrers le 28 octobre 1407. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. En 1421, à l’âge de 32 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est constable of roxburgh castle - being paid £1,000 p.a.. Il est décédé le 8 août 1436, à Finedon, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Northumbria, Angleterre.

de.Kirkby Ravensworth, Yorkshire: Kirkby Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John Greystoke um 1390 in Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph Greystoke 38 und seine Mutter Katherine de Clifford 38. Er hat am 28. Oktober 1407 Lady Elizabeth de Ferrers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1421, als er 32 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als constable of roxburgh castle - being paid £1,000 p.a. aufgeführt. Er starb am 8. August 1436 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Finedon, Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Northumbria, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Greystoke è nato il circa 1390 nel Cumberland, England, il suo padre, Ralph Greystoke, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Katherine de Clifford, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth de Ferrers il 28 ottobre 1407. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1421, all'età di 32 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come constable of roxburgh castle - being paid £1,000 p.a.. Morì il 8 agosto 1436, nel Finedon, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Northumbria, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Greystokeが約1390年にイギリスクウンバーランドで生まれた時，父Ralph Greystokeは38歳，母Katherine de Cliffordは38歳であった。1407年10月28日にLady Elizabeth de Ferrersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1421年，32歳の時，職業はconstable of roxburgh castle - being paid £1,000 p.a.と記録されている。彼は1436年8月8日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアフィンエドンで47歳で死去し，イギリスノースウンブリアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Greystoke(이)가 대략 1390년 영국 c벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Greystoke(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine de Clifford(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1407년 10월 28일 Lady Elizabeth de Ferrers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1421년, 32세의 나이로 그의 직업은 constable of roxburgh castle - being paid £1,000 p.a.이었다. 그는 1436년 8월 8일 영국 노르섬프토실르 핑네던에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르스브리아에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Greystoke nasceu aproximadamente 1390, em Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Greystoke, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Katherine de Clifford, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth de Ferrers em 28 de outubro de 1407. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1421, com 32 anos, sua profissão aparece como constable of roxburgh castle - being paid £1,000 p.a.. Ele faleceu em 8 de agosto de 1436, em Finedon, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Northumbria, Inglaterra.

ro.Kirkby Ravensworth, Yorkshire: Kirkby Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Greystoke родился около 1390 г. в местности кумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph Greystoke было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine de Clifford, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth de Ferrers 28 октября 1407 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. В 1421 году, в возрасте 32 лет,  он работал по профессии constable of roxburgh castle - being paid £1,000 p.a. Он умер 8 августа 1436 г. в местности фаинедон, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности нортумбря, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Greystoke nació aproximadamente 1390, en Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph Greystoke, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Katherine de Clifford, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Lady Elizabeth de Ferrers el 28 de octubre de 1407. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1421, a la edad de 32 años, su ocupación registrada era constable of roxburgh castle - being paid £1,000 p.a.. Murió el 8 de agosto de 1436, en Finedon, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Northumbria, Inglaterra.
